---
title: "Strolling players:A harmony of contrasts - by Charlotte Mary Yonge and Christabel R Coleridge(1893)"
sort_title: "Strolling players:A harmony of contrasts - by Charlotte Mary Yonge and Christabel R Coleridge(1893)"
year: 1893
slug: "Strolling Players"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1893*



### [Click here for an online text of*Strolling players; a harmony of contrast*from Internet Archive](https://archive.org/details/strollingplayers00yonguoft/page/n7/mode/2up)
